item.title: Computer Networking Map
item.description: NIC Network interface controller (NIC) is the hardware component for networking. NIC Offload NIC Scaling and Steering TCP TODOs Congestion Control Algorithms explicit congestion notification (ECN) HyStart++ SACK loss recovery Proportional Rate Reduction (RFC6937) bandwidth-delay product (BDP) packet pacing BBRv3 for WAN traffic and BBR.Swift for traffic within a datacenter .

item.title: NIC Offload
item.description: Hardware Offload TCP Segmentation Offload (TSO) Uses the TCP protocol to send large packets. Uses the NIC to handle segmentation, and then adds the TCP, IP and data link layer protocol headers to each segment.

item.title: NIC Scaling and Steering
item.description: Receive (RX) flowchart LR nic[NIC hardware buffer] irq[hard IRQ] softirq[soft IRQ] recvq[app socket queue] app[application] nic==>irq==>softirq==>recvq==>app ...

item.title: Microsoft Azure Network Adapter
item.description: Driver The driver supports Linux and Windows only. On Linux Linux v6.10+ is needed. Example patches required: github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/a7dfeda6fdeccab4c7c3dce9a72c4262b9530c80 (robustness) github.com/torvalds/linux/commit/b1d13f7a3b5396503e6869ed627bb4eeab9b524f (performance) Source: github.com/microsoft/azurelinux/blob/2.0/SPECS/kernel-azure/kernel-azure.spec github.com/microsoft/CBL-Mariner-Linux-Kernel/commits/rolling-lts/mariner-2/5.15.158.2/drivers/net/ethernet/microsoft/mana (backported patches in 2024) Compatibility MANA maintains feature-parity with previous Azure networking features.

item.title: lispy
item.description: Recommendation Lispy overrides some keys in insert mode. If you are proficient in Vim, stay away from lispy and perhaps try ParEdit. Key Bindings Slurp: > Barf: < Clone: c Forward: ] Backward: [ Jump to matching pair: d Split: M-j Join: + Typing " inside of a string inserts \"\", so the split command is very useful for string templating.

item.title: CIDER
item.description: Starting the REPL Start the REPL with cider-jack-in, before evaluating any Clojure expressions. Basic Evaluation Load the buffer with cider-load-buffer (C-c C-k), and execute the top level form under point with cider-eval-defun-at-point (C-c C-c).

item.title: Consult
item.description: Asynchronous Search github.com/minad/consult#asynchronous-search Doom Emacs uses the perl splitting style, which splits the input string at a punctuation character and treats ...

item.title: Compress Picture PDF Files
item.description: gm convert -density 150 -compress JPEG Default -density is 72. If the image quality is too bad, consider increasing it. -compress JPEG enables compression.

item.title: Blink-based SSH Workstation
item.description: Server Setup I use Nix to install latest software, chezmoi to manage configuration files, and starship and fastfetch for my shell (zsh). fd is installed as a dependency for Doom Emacs, and mosh is used with Blink to provide UDP roaming capability.

item.title: Azure VM size series naming
item.description: Dpsv6 is the base name of the Azure Cobalt 100 processor series. The D family of VM sizes are one of Azure’s general purpose VM sizes. The standard general purpose VMs offer 4 GiB of memory per vCPU and come without local disk.
